chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1797 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA 7238/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7106/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-10-2025 Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< The petitioners, through the instant Constitutional Petition, seek directions against respondents No.2 and 3 for the appointment of an honest police officer and for conducting an impartial investigation in Crime No.58 of 2025, registered under Sections 302, 148, 149, and 337-H(ii) PPC at Police Station Duber, District Sukkur. Since an alternate and efficacious remedy under Sections 22-A and 22-B, Cr.P.C., for approaching the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace is available to the petitioners, and without availing such remedy they have directly approached this Court, the instant petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with all listed applications. However, the petitioners shall be at liberty to approach the learned Ex- Officio Justice of Peace for redressal of their grievances, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
